body:
Fixes #1737

## Summary

- Restores sub-session input semantics to restored-context pressure: `input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens`.
- Renames multi-section headings from `session segments` to `sub-sessions` and removes the user-facing `peak request:` label from solver logs and PR-comment budget output.
- Keeps model Total lines cumulative with new input, cache writes, and cache reads split into separate buckets.
- Renders result-event-only single sub-agent rows as a simple `input / context` detail line, while preserving the detailed cache split on the Total line.
- Adds the requested case-study artifacts under `docs/case-studies/issue-1737/`, including the issue/PR payloads and referenced solution draft log.
- Adds a patch changeset for the user-facing budget stats fix.

## Reproduction

The referenced solution draft log showed Opus sub-session rows like:

```text
**Claude Opus 4.7:** (2 session segments)
1. peak request: 24.0K / 1M (2%) input tokens, 39.0K / 128K (30%) output tokens
```

That value was only the largest uncached request input. The new regression covers the same shape and expects restored-context sub-session rows such as:

```text
**Claude Opus 4.7:** (2 sub-sessions)
1. 155.3K / 1M (16%) input tokens, 39.0K / 128K (30%) output tokens
```

## Verification

- [x] `node tests/test-issue-1737-budget-stats.mjs` ŌĆö 3/3 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-issue-1710-format-fixes.mjs` ŌĆö 8/8 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-issue-1710-budget-trace.mjs` ŌĆö 10/10 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-budget-stats-issue-1539.mjs` ŌĆö 11/11 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-budget-stats-issue-1508.mjs` ŌĆö 15/15 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-budget-stats-issue-1501.mjs` ŌĆö 12/12 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-issue-1600-budget-stats.mjs` ŌĆö 9/9 pass.
- [x] `node tests/test-issue-1600-comprehensive.mjs` ŌĆö 55/55 pass.
- [x] `npm test` ŌĆö all 80 selected default test files passed.
- [x] `npm run lint`.
- [x] `npm run format:check`.
- [x] `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs`.
- [x] `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`.
- [x] `bash scripts/check-mjs-syntax.sh`.
- [x] `node tests/docs-validation.mjs`.
- [x] `node tests/test-docs-language-sync.mjs`.
- [x] `npm run check:duplication`.
- [x] `git diff --cached --check` before commit.

Screenshots are not applicable; this is CLI/text budget rendering.

## Case Study

See `docs/case-studies/issue-1737/README.md` for the collected data, timeline, requirements, root causes, and implementation plan.
title: fix: restore budget stats context accounting
